title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. subirriguum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. subirriguum, also known as the hawkweed or hieracium plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. subirriguum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
